note: sost-explorer.html V13 RC1 banner expansion. (A) WHAT V13 CHANGES list: II-A bullet split into II-A + II-B + III + SbPoW hardening. II-B mentions 3-of-5 threshold + revocation + mirror_url-never-fetched. III mentions BEACON_P2P_ACTIVATION_HEIGHT = V13_HEIGHT + 4KB cap + 32 LRU + 8/min rate limit + advisory only. SbPoW hardening mentions the four new committed preimage fields + domain tag bump to SOST/POW-SIG/v13. (B) FALLBACK TO V14 list: removed stale entries for Beacon II-B (was Target V13 if ready otherwise V14) and Beacon III (was Active at V13_HEIGHT but still in the deferred list). PoPC + Gold Vault governance remain in the deferred list. (C) V13 Public Scope green box summary updated: now lists cASERT E7-H35 + DTD cooldown 5->6 + drift cap 60s->30s + SbPoW hardening + Beacon Phase II-A + II-B (3-of-5 threshold) + III (P2P gossip advisory). (D) New cyan Community OTC / P2P Board section between the Beacon disclaimer area: clarifies separation from Beacon node-to-node gossip; user-to-user board inside SOST Talk; three NOT invariants; no admins DM first; small test transactions; links to sost-talk.html, sost-otc.html, sost-community.html, SOST_TALK_COMMUNITY_RULES.md. (E) Beacon loudspeaker disclaimer updated to cover all three phases plus mentions the link-time invariant test_v13_beacon_phase3_p2p.cpp t15. ZERO consensus / code change.
